name: Doyle, Joanna Agnes
description: Why anyone who spends most of her time crocheting, drawing cozy corners, and reading "The Modern Hostess," should want to go to Normal School is more than we can fathom.

name: Thompson, Frances Antoinette
motto:
"A quiet lass, there are but few
Who know the treasures hid in you."
description: An earnest advocate of the fourth commandment, and lives up to her ideals. Always waits until she has something worth while to say and then says it.

name: Marsh, Leah
description: A shy little miss, very domestic in her tastes. Her hobby is basketball, and she plays it with a dash. We are not sure whether she intends to teach Domestic Science or practice it.

name: Jelley, Eleanor
motto: "Naught but Death shall e'er divorce my dignity."
description: Prim, neat, and dignified. Has an intelligent bearing. Dresses well. Has convictions of her own. Positively knows a "housefly" when she sees it.

name: Anderson, Rachel
description: Dignified, studious, and conscientious. Is careful of her English and desirous to please. An earnest advocate of Women's Rights.

name: Walworth, Mabel
motto: "She seems made of cheerful yesterdays and confident tomorrows."
description: Takes things calmly. Fond of traveling. Has an ambition to reach the North Pole.

name: Curtiss, Ada Blanche
description: A highly capable and devout young lady. Very much interested in Nature Study, making a special study of the "Roach."

name: Myers, Christina
high school: Elyria High School; Elyria City Training School
description: A serious, earnest student, who has proved that a city girl can teach a country school quite as well as a girl of Nature's own rearing.

name: Pierce, Elizabeth
motto: "For if she will, she will, you may depend on't. And if she won't, she won't, and there's the end on't."
description: A very industrious student who has a natural bent for psychology. She has an ambition to read all the magazines and newspapers in the library, and can appreciate a good joke.

name: Gorz, Charlotte M.
motto: "As prone to mischief as able to perform it."
description: This girl has a way all her own. Takes the lead in matters of diplomacy and serves as peace-maker, despite the fact that she dislikes to see others peaceful, especially when alarm clocks are within range.

name: Starr, Ethel Marie
description: The shining "Star" that has inspired us onward and upward. Always holds her head high. Regular and attentive (?) at Assembly. Fond of good books. Favorite author is Noah Webster. A good storyteller.

name: Moore, Frances Elizabeth
motto: "She is pretty to walk with, Witty to talk with, And pleasant, too, to think on."
description: A discreet maiden and a social favorite everywhere.

name: Chalmers, Jean L.
motto: "I make it a practice to put my troubles in the bottom of my heart and sit on the lid."
description: The happiest, jolliest Senior at Kent Normal. Has a special talent for story-writing.

name: Fields, Cora
motto: "And when she played, the atmosphere was filled with music."
description: Our musician. She is ambitious to the breaking point, and has a penchant for burning midnight oil.

name: Burr, Amelia
motto: "Just being happy is a fine thing to do."
description: A Burr in name only. She is not a relative of the historical Burr. She knows how to play basketball, and is always happy.

name: Eby, Anna Marie
description: The married one of our number. The Class of 1914 feel honored to have Mrs. Eby take her degree with them at Kent Normal.
